title: Flowered
description: Expands sunflower plains and mushroom island while adding new flowers
body:
Flowered - the Flower Expansion Mod
- 
this mod adds various new features to flowers,fulling the world with Bloom,currently expanding Sunflower Plains and Mushroom Island.

Biome Features
----------------------
- Mushroom Island - Tall Red and Brown Mushrooms, Mycelium Grass and Cluckshrooms from mc earth
- Sunflower Plains - Yellow Tulip, Sunflower Bush, short sunflower, sunflower oil, sunstone, and moosunflowers
- Crimson Forest - Crimson Lily
- Plains - Buttercup
- Forest - Cyan Rose Bush
